title: Monthly entry clearance visa application: May 2025
body: "These statistics will be updated on a monthly ongoing basis whilst we review the user need for monthly updates. The quarterly Immigration system statistics provide detailed information on visa applications and outcomes.   The Microsoft Excel .xlsx files may not be suitable for users of assistive technology. If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of these documents in a more accessible format, please email MigrationStatsEnquiries@homeoffice.gov.uk Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.  "
